question.label: Next-two-weeks
question.name: Given what we've talked about, what's your priority for the next two weeks?
question.description: Closes by landing on a concrete commitment for the next check-in window.

assessment.note: [SKIP] no signal — planner bypassed, queue carried forward

new_queue.label: Next-two-weeks
new_queue.name: Given what we've talked about, where do you want to focus first in the next two weeks?

history.answer_excerpt: I am proud of the outcomes, but the pace should not be normal.
I still do not get enough substantive feedback on key decisions.
If we reset scope now, the next month is sustainable.
The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
Late nights came from carrying decision bottlenecks and final reviews.
Some of that work could have moved to the team sooner.
